description: Called back to Fender following a Shopify migration that had severely broken analytics, eroding trust in data across the organization. Within a month, restored confidence by rebuilding top dashboards and solving tracking bugs across the site. Fixed a user attribution issue affecting 20% of orders, reconfigured channel attribution for accurate cross-channel reporting, and established a CRO program with an initial focus on the product page. Led a comprehensive teardown of site performance to democratize knowledge and prioritize UX improvements.
